preamble: The elision of the voiced alveolar lateral fricative [ɮ] is a process where this lateral fricative is lost from the phonetic realization.

examples.note: Marginal reduction in certain speech registers.
Loss of voiced lateral fricatives in ancestral reconstructions.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
